topics.title: Anamorphic Perspective Art
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for perspective illusions that only resolve from one controlled viewing angle.

en.title: Anamorphic Perspective Art
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for perspective illusions that only resolve from one controlled viewing angle.

zh-CN.title: 变形透视艺术
zh-CN.description: 测试只在特定视角成立的变形透视图案。

topics.title: Crystal Ball Narrative
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for compressing changing miniature worlds into one consistent crystal ball object.

en.title: Crystal Ball Narrative
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for compressing changing miniature worlds into one consistent crystal ball object.

zh-CN.title: 水晶球叙事
zh-CN.description: 把变化的微缩世界压进同一颗水晶球，测试主体连续性。

topics.title: Eight-Panel Consistency Comic
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for multi-panel comics that keep character identity, product props, layout rhythm, and visual style consistent.

en.title: Eight-Panel Consistency Comic
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for multi-panel comics that keep character identity, product props, layout rhythm, and visual style consistent.

zh-CN.title: 八格一致性漫画
zh-CN.description: 测试多格漫画中的角色身份、产品道具、版式节奏和画风一致性。

topics.title: High-Speed Freeze
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for freezing fast physical events with controlled macro studio clarity.

en.title: High-Speed Freeze
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for freezing fast physical events with controlled macro studio clarity.

zh-CN.title: 高速摄影级定格
zh-CN.description: 用受控微距棚拍清晰定格高速物理瞬间。

topics.title: Sixteen Reference Fusion
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for fusing many visual inputs into one coherent image while preserving identity, place, materials, and style cues.

en.title: Sixteen Reference Fusion
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for fusing many visual inputs into one coherent image while preserving identity, place, materials, and style cues.

zh-CN.title: 十六参考融合
zh-CN.description: 把多组视觉输入融合成一张连贯图，同时保持身份、地点、材质和风格线索。

topics.title: Song Dynasty Social Feed
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for modern social-feed layouts reimagined through Song dynasty public life, literary culture, and market scenes.

en.title: Song Dynasty Social Feed
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for modern social-feed layouts reimagined through Song dynasty public life, literary culture, and market scenes.

zh-CN.title: 宋朝朋友圈
zh-CN.description: 用现代社交动态版式重构宋代文人、市场和出游场景。

topics.title: Stereoscopic Depth
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for images that encode depth through stereo pairs, anaglyph rendering, and hidden-depth patterns.

en.title: Stereoscopic Depth
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for images that encode depth through stereo pairs, anaglyph rendering, and hidden-depth patterns.

zh-CN.title: 立体视差
zh-CN.description: 测试左右视差、红蓝 3D 和隐藏深度图案。

topics.title: Tessellation Pattern
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for seamless geometric tiling, optical illusion structure, and Escher-like interlocking silhouettes.

en.title: Tessellation Pattern
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for seamless geometric tiling, optical illusion structure, and Escher-like interlocking silhouettes.

zh-CN.title: 无缝拼贴
zh-CN.description: 测试无缝几何平铺、视觉错觉结构和 Escher 式互嵌轮廓。

topics.title: Thinking Mode
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for turning research, trend reasoning, and multi-step analysis into structured editorial images.

en.title: Thinking Mode
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for turning research, trend reasoning, and multi-step analysis into structured editorial images.

zh-CN.title: Thinking Mode
zh-CN.description: 把研究、趋势判断和多步分析转化成结构化编辑插画。

topics.title: Ultra-Long Scroll Painting
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for dense vertical scroll images that keep continuous geography, time, and narrative structure legible across an extreme aspect ratio.

en.title: Ultra-Long Scroll Painting
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for dense vertical scroll images that keep continuous geography, time, and narrative structure legible across an extreme aspect ratio.

zh-CN.title: 超长竖卷画
zh-CN.description: 测试极端长画幅中连续地理、时间线和叙事密度是否仍然清楚。

topics.title: USPTO Patent Diagram
topics.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for black-and-white patent-style technical plates with strict linework, labels, and multi-view structure.

en.title: USPTO Patent Diagram
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for black-and-white patent-style technical plates with strict linework, labels, and multi-view structure.

zh-CN.title: 美国专利技术图
zh-CN.description: 测试黑白专利风技术线稿、多视图编号和结构拆解。

packages.title: Anamorphic Studies
packages.description: Three independent perspective illusion images with one readable resolved shape from a controlled camera point.
packages.creative_direction: Each image uses a different physical setting for an anamorphic illusion: rooftop paint, cylindrical mirror reflection, and transit-floor wayfinding.

en.title: Anamorphic Studies
en.description: Three independent perspective illusion images with one readable resolved shape from a controlled camera point.

zh-CN.title: 变形透视单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张独立透视错觉图，从受控机位看见一个完整图形。

packages.title: Oracle Seasons
packages.description: A reference-dependent series: one base crystal ball followed by seasonal variations preserving the same object.
packages.creative_direction: True continuity series: image 01 establishes the crystal ball, brass stand, table position, lighting and camera angle; images 02-04 depend on 01 as --ref.

en.title: Oracle Seasons
en.description: A reference-dependent series: one base crystal ball followed by seasonal variations preserving the same object.

zh-CN.title: 四季预言球
zh-CN.description: 一张基准水晶球，后续季节变化都依赖它保持同一主体。

packages.title: Launch Comic
packages.description: A reference-dependent four-image series about the same hero, outfit, glowing product orb, and eight-panel comic language.
packages.creative_direction: Image 01 establishes the protagonist, outfit, glowing GPT-IMAGE-2 orb, manga panel grammar, and launch-story tone; images 02-04 reuse that identity and page language in different locations.

en.title: Launch Comic
en.description: A reference-dependent four-image series about the same hero, outfit, glowing product orb, and eight-panel comic language.

zh-CN.title: 发布漫画
zh-CN.description: 四张依赖参考图的系列，保持同一主角、服装、发光产品球和八格漫画语言。

packages.title: Comic Studies
packages.description: Three independent eight-panel comic pages testing layout, character consistency, and commercial storytelling.
packages.creative_direction: Independent comic studies under the same theme: each is a complete eight-panel page with its own scene, protagonist, and product-story structure.

en.title: Comic Studies
en.description: Three independent eight-panel comic pages testing layout, character consistency, and commercial storytelling.

zh-CN.title: 漫画单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张独立八格漫画页，测试版式、角色一致性和商业叙事。

packages.title: Impact Studies
packages.description: Three independent high-speed impact prompts that can run fully in parallel.
packages.creative_direction: Independent single-image package: no reference dependency, shared black studio language, designed to fill queue slots safely.

en.title: Impact Studies
en.description: Three independent high-speed impact prompts that can run fully in parallel.

zh-CN.title: 冲击研究
zh-CN.description: 三张互相独立、可完全并发运行的高速冲击提示词。

packages.title: Reference Fusion Atlas
packages.description: A reference-dependent series where one sixteen-tile source board drives three fusion scenes.
packages.creative_direction: Image 01 creates a public synthetic reference board with sixteen distinct cues; images 02-04 depend on it as --ref and fuse those cues into new coherent scenes.

en.title: Reference Fusion Atlas
en.description: A reference-dependent series where one sixteen-tile source board drives three fusion scenes.

zh-CN.title: 参考融合图谱
zh-CN.description: 一张十六格来源板驱动三张融合场景的参考依赖系列。

packages.title: Fusion Studies
packages.description: Three independent images that simulate sixteen-input fusion as complete self-contained compositions.
packages.creative_direction: Independent fusion studies: each image visibly synthesizes many source-like cues without requiring external private reference files.

en.title: Fusion Studies
en.description: Three independent images that simulate sixteen-input fusion as complete self-contained compositions.

zh-CN.title: 融合单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张独立图，用完整构图模拟十六输入融合能力。

packages.title: Social Feed Studies
packages.description: Three independent mobile feed mockups that fuse Song dynasty scenes with contemporary social UI structure.
packages.creative_direction: Each image is an independent fictional mobile feed screen: a literati nine-grid post, a night-market comment thread, and a travel story stack. The UI should feel modern but not copy a real app.

en.title: Social Feed Studies
en.description: Three independent mobile feed mockups that fuse Song dynasty scenes with contemporary social UI structure.

zh-CN.title: 社交动态单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张独立移动端动态界面图，把宋代场景与当代社交 UI 结构融合。

packages.title: Depth Studies
packages.description: Three independent stereoscopic experiments: a cross-view pair, a red-cyan anaglyph, and a hidden-depth autostereogram.
packages.creative_direction: Each image uses a different established stereo visual language while keeping the depth cue visible as a finished gallery asset.

en.title: Depth Studies
en.description: Three independent stereoscopic experiments: a cross-view pair, a red-cyan anaglyph, and a hidden-depth autostereogram.

zh-CN.title: 立体视差单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张独立立体视觉实验：左右视差、红蓝 3D 和隐藏深度图。

packages.title: Living Tiles
packages.description: A reference-dependent series: one base tessellation tile followed by three material and subject variations preserving the same seamless geometry.
packages.creative_direction: True geometry-continuity series: image 01 establishes the interlocking tile lattice; images 02-04 depend on 01 as --ref and reinterpret the same seamless structure through coral, moth, and city materials.

en.title: Living Tiles
en.description: A reference-dependent series: one base tessellation tile followed by three material and subject variations preserving the same seamless geometry.

zh-CN.title: 活体瓷砖
zh-CN.description: 一张基准无缝拼贴图，后续三张以不同材质和主体延续同一几何结构。

packages.title: Market Reasoning
packages.description: A reference-dependent editorial series about turning market signals into one consistent visual reasoning system.
packages.creative_direction: Image 01 establishes a hand-drawn editorial market mountain language; images 02-04 reuse that same layout grammar and character system while changing the reasoning layer.

en.title: Market Reasoning
en.description: A reference-dependent editorial series about turning market signals into one consistent visual reasoning system.

zh-CN.title: 市场推理图
zh-CN.description: 把市场信号转成一套连续的编辑插画推理系统。

packages.title: Reasoning Studies
packages.description: Three independent images testing structured visual reasoning without reference dependencies.
packages.creative_direction: Independent studies for the Thinking Mode theme: each image converts a different reasoning workflow into a clear editorial or product-like visual system.

en.title: Reasoning Studies
en.description: Three independent images testing structured visual reasoning without reference dependencies.

zh-CN.title: 推理单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张不依赖参考图的结构化视觉推理单图。

packages.title: Scroll Studies
packages.description: Three independent 9:21 vertical scroll studies testing continuous scene planning, dense local detail, and stable extreme framing.
packages.creative_direction: Each image is a complete vertical scroll rather than a series dependency: one city lane, one terrain map, and one life timeline, all built for dense visual scanning.

en.title: Scroll Studies
en.description: Three independent 9:21 vertical scroll studies testing continuous scene planning, dense local detail, and stable extreme framing.

zh-CN.title: 长卷单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张独立 9:21 竖卷图，测试连续场景规划、高密度细节和极端画幅稳定性。

packages.title: Patent Plates
packages.description: Three independent patent-style plates using monochrome linework, numbered callouts, and technical decomposition.
packages.creative_direction: Each image should look like a clean patent drawing sheet rather than a rendered product: white background, black linework, FIG labels, and precise callout numbering.

en.title: Patent Plates
en.description: Three independent patent-style plates using monochrome linework, numbered callouts, and technical decomposition.

zh-CN.title: 专利图单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张独立专利风图版，使用黑白线稿、编号标注和技术拆解。
